playbook.intent: Live MVP stuck under ~$1K MRR → documented PMF signal OR triggered pivot.
playbook.scope: MVP is live but stuck under ~$1K MRR. Solo founder runs a structured discovery + positioning + experiment loop until either a fit signal is reached (retention curve flattens, NPS-style pull, organic referrals) or a documented pivot is triggered. Exit artifact is a PMF scorecard with evidence trail.

success-criteria.criterion: PMF scorecard filled (retention, pull, referral, NPS rows)
Positioning statement rewritten with sharper ICP
1 fit experiment shipped per stage (≥3 experiments total)
Written go/pivot decision with evidence references

stage.name: Diagnose
stage.intent: Map current state: retention curves, cohort decay, paying-user concentration.

tasks.task: Pull retention + cohort data from analytics

stage.decision-gate: Advance if signal is unclear (most common). Skip to Decide if PMF is unambiguous.

stage.name: Listen
stage.intent: 10 power-user interviews + 5 churned-user post-mortems for asymmetric signal.
stage.decision-gate: Advance if a single dominant pull theme appears. Loop if signal is fragmented across >5 themes.

stage.name: Position
stage.intent: Rewrite ICP and value-prop against the dominant pull theme.

tasks.task: Rewrite landing-page hero against pull theme

stage.decision-gate: Advance once new copy is live. If founder cannot write the ICP in one sentence, return to Listen.

stage.name: Experiment
stage.intent: Run 3 fit experiments: activation, retention, acquisition.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when all 3 experiments report. Re-run if any experiment lacks measurable result.

stage.name: Decide
stage.intent: Written go/pivot decision backed by scorecard + experiment evidence.

outputs.output: Decision doc with PMF rubric output

stage.decision-gate: Required output is a written decision. No 'maybe'. No 'wait and see'.

extra.value: [Scaling distribution before PMF — out of scope, Hiring or fund-raising — single-operator playbook]
[MVP live with at least 30 days of usage data, Stripe (or equivalent) recording paid signups]
[Treating noisy weekly numbers as PMF signal — use cohort retention instead, Pivoting on a single loud customer voice — wait for theme convergence]
['Can I explain the pull theme in one sentence backed by 5 quotes?', 'Did each experiment produce a measurable result, or did I move on early?']
{human: faion get-content pmf-hunt-post-mvp --format md, agent: faion get-content pmf-hunt-post-mvp --format context, json: faion get-content pmf-hunt-post-mvp --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
